sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'mươi' changes 'tám mươi bốn' (eighty-four) to 'tám bốn' (eight four), which significantly alters the intended number and meaning.
'sáu' means 'six' and 'cháu' means 'child' in Vietnamese; substituting a number with an unrelated word makes the sequence incoherent and changes the meaning significantly.
